welcome to the Morimens 5 Stages of Grief™

Hi Keepers,

Today we sent out Arachne's birthday mail a bit later than usual because of a code glitch. Our Live Ops people had to manually send it, which means it ended up machine translated.
I think you deserve to see a human translated version because each Awakener's birthday mail is special.

> Dear Keeper,
> 
> The day of one's birth. I suppose you would consider it special. 
> To me, every day upon the web of fate bears equal weight. Other stories are what bestow upon this day its particular meaning.
> On this day, I was born. 
> On this day, I came to comprehend prophecy. 
> On this day, I received the spindle that weaves fate. 
> On this day, I beheld those intricate threads of destiny, and the nightmares at the threads' ends. 
> To the Weaver of Fate, this day is unremarkable. To a Performer upon the stage, this day is worthy of celebration. 
> And of all my identities, it is the Performer that brings me the greatest joy.
> Keeper, tonight, every light in the Theatre of Fate has been extinguished, save for one stage that blazes in brilliant radiance. You once mentioned that you wished to see more of the fates I have lived through. And now, what is to be performed upon this stage is a tale of my very own. I do not know which passage it shall stage. I have offered up my Memories to the stage, and she shall, from among those most intensely lived moments, choose the one you most long to see, and present it upon tonight's stage. 
> That story may bring me pain, or perhaps shame, but such things matter little, do they not? 
> I think that, every now and then, to let the spindle weave of its own accord and to become a pure spectator is a most pleasing thing. 
> Now, I entrust the sole ticket to this performance to you.
> Come, Keeper, and bring this letter with you. 
> Tonight, a story known to no other awaits your arrival.
> 
> Arachne
We have also human translated all of the older mails so far, but codes need to be updated for the new translations to show up. We expect to finish that by the next version update.
you really love arachne, eh ace? 🩷
Don't we all?
True!
so will the old mail be resent with the human translations or will it be updated in the background?
Yayyy
<:Hameln_love:1468257934348783749> arachne
They won't be resent, but the mail translations in the Saved Mail interface will be updated.
Right now it still displays the old MTL because the codes are set to display a snapshot of what it looked like when you received it

Ahem, weeeeeeeeellllllllllllllllll
for one, she mentioned N *by name* name before Ryker did 
Secondly when it cuts back to mythag, Dexter uses Casiah's core appearing as proof that N showed up. Which was true, but why did he use that as proof unless they already had a connection of some sort
Casiah's whole troupe disappeared one by one by a mysterious benefactor, and eventually she too died by a poisoned wine glass from said noble benefactor. I can't *prove* this one is N, but I suspect heavily that it was due to the fact that a girl without emotions would be entertaining, and the things that followed. After Casiah died, she got her power to steal emotions when she was awakened as an awakener. Her WoD tells the story of her perspective so we cant tell how long she was dead for, since she skips to when she was awakened after she died, but either: A. Said benefactor awakened her (unlikely but possible) or B. her silver was left there. Her story 1 states the silver eventually ends up in daffodil's hands and a certain *Lord Dexter* is the one to buy it, || who is, yknow. N. It wouldn't be the first time he's done something like this, as Xu who is also connected to him hid her silver in a boat, and mythag searched it several times and couldnt find it, whereas Dexter found it instantly. This next point isn't very strong but compounded with everything else it kinda just pokes out at me. During Lily's event where you make a movie with casiah, the resonance event Casiah asks you to find something to do, you contact her "mysterious benefactor" who is obviously lord dexter. Although i suppose this could be shrugged off as just saying Dexter wants to help out the movie idea, as one of the upgrades says "Miss Dexter(?)" gave you an allowence. Which is either a weird way of referring to ramona or likely a translation error as said event isnt localized yet.|| < chapter 8 spoilers. 
But yeah i'm pretty confident theres at least *something* going on there and i want to know more!!!
